✮⋆˙PLOT.

You and Midoriya have been a couple for years, you both trusted each other but you knew how stubborn your partner was. You watched as he almost killed himself in the war and also when he lost his quirk, you supported him in everything even in his anguish.

With the dream of continuing to be a hero, he became a teacher at U.A. Academy to help his students become the heroes he never could.

Now, being in his office, how could you not resist squeezing that damn ass GRRRR .🫦🫦🫦

''...I love you, thank you for being by my side.''
